title: [ExportVerilog] Inline _T wires
body:
Now the example in #2674 will produce the following with `--disable-name-preservation`:

```verilog
module Foo(     // .\2674.fir:2:10
  input  a, b, c, d,
  output e, f);

  assign e = a | b | c | d;     // .\2674.fir:2:10, :10:17, :12:14
  assign f = a | b | c & d;     // .\2674.fir:2:10, :10:17, :14:19, :15:14
endmodule
```

The judgment relies on the original name of the CSE’d expression. I don’t know whether it is sufficient.
